title: carex echinus
intro: Carex echinus, also known as the hairy-leaved sedge, is a type of flowering plant in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is primarily found in China, where it is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs and sore throats, and aiding in digestion. In traditional Chinese medicine, Carex echinus is often prepared as a decoction or infused in tea to take advantage of its herbal properties.
